_comment: Published reference numbers per reader × benchmark. Used by run_smoke.py to verify our baseline runs land within ±20pp of the published figure. When no published number exists ('establish empirically'), the smoke verdict reports ⚠ ANOMALY only if the value is implausibly low or high; otherwise accepted.

full_context.source: no published Qwen2.5-14B LongMemEval score; establish empirically

baseline_icl.source: extrapolated from GPT-4 ICL 57.78 MEDCON, WangLab 2023
